overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit storefronts, digital billboards, and futuristic architecture. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), with the camera moving steadily through pedestrian shopping areas, underpasses, and along waterfront promenades with reflective wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial pedestrian street with food vendors

events.description: slight left turn while continuing forward past the food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet pavement past neon-lit food stalls and palm trees

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing red umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: food stall with illuminated 'SANDY DOG' signage and orange canopy
tall palm trees lining the left side of the walkway
row of shops with bright pink and cyan neon lighting and digital displays
large vertical yellow and blue illuminated advertisement on distant skyscraper

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked pedestrian street lined with neon-lit food vendors and shops. The 'SANDY DOG' stand is prominent on the right, while palm trees line the left. A pedestrian with a red umbrella approaches from the opposite direction, and the wet pavement reflects the vibrant pink and blue neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching an overpass bridge

events.description: exiting the narrow commercial street into a wider plaza area with wooden decking
transitioning from neon shop lighting to warm yellow street lamp illumination

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking toward a large concrete overpass bridge structure ahead

entered.detail: large concrete bridge structure with metal railings spanning across the plaza
illuminated vertical light poles casting warm glow on the wet wooden deck
wooden plank walkway replacing the previous tiled pavement

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider plaza with wooden decking as the camera turns left toward a massive concrete overpass bridge. The lighting shifts from colorful neon to warm yellow street lamps. The palm trees recede into the distance on the left as the camera approaches the underpass entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with digital advertising walls

events.description: entering the covered underpass beneath the bridge, sheltering from the rain
surrounded by bright digital billboard illumination on both walls

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered corridor lined with large digital advertisements and vending machines

notable_agents.action: person with illuminated purple umbrella walking through the underpass ahead

entered.detail: enclosed walkway with exposed metal beam ceiling providing shelter from rain
large illuminated advertising screens displaying food and product imagery on corridor walls
row of green and red automated vending machines with glowing displays

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered underpass that provides shelter from the rain, with a ceiling of exposed metal beams. The walls are covered in large, bright digital billboards displaying advertisements. A person with a glowing purple umbrella walks ahead, and vending machines line the right wall near the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with tiered concrete seating stairs

events.description: exiting the covered underpass back to open waterfront area with city skyline view
slight right turn while continuing along the waterfront path

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade past concrete stairs and illuminated vending machines

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the concrete stairs to the right, sheltered from rain

entered.detail: wide tiered concrete steps leading up the embankment, with people sitting on them
metal railing separating the walkway from the water below
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and high-rise buildings across the water

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass onto a waterfront promenade with a view of the city skyline across the water. Wide concrete stairs ascend on the right, where a person sits sheltered from the rain. The camera continues along the wet path, passing vending machines and tall street lamps, with the yellow neon billboard visible in the distant skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit shopping street into a sheltered urban underpass and finally out toward a wide waterfront promenade. It begins by gliding past rain-soaked food vendors and palm trees, where the wet pavement reflects pink and blue lights as a pedestrian with a red umbrella passes by. As the path opens into a wider plaza with wooden decking, the camera turns left toward a massive concrete overpass, and the colorful neon shifts into the warm yellow glow of street lamps. The scene then transitions into a covered underpass beneath exposed metal beams, moving past bright digital billboards and a person with a glowing purple umbrella before reaching a row of vending machines. Finally, the camera exits the shelter onto a wet promenade, passing wide concrete stairs and tall lamps to reveal a sprawling city skyline across the water.
